member.name: T:IDADRS.Application.DTOs.ApiResponse`1
member.summary: Uniform API envelope returned by every controller action.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Application.DTOs.ApiResponse
member.summary: Non-generic convenience overload for void responses.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IFileStorageService.SaveAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.IFormFile,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves the file and returns the relative storage path.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IFileStorageService.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a file by its relative storage path.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IFileStorageService.GenerateSignedUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a signed HMAC-SHA256 URL valid for 1 hour.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IFileStorageService.ValidateSignedUrl(System.String,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Validates that a signed URL is still valid and untampered.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IJwtService.GenerateAccessToken(IDADRS.Core.Entities.User)
member.summary: Generates a short-lived access token (15 min).

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IJwtService.GenerateRefreshToken
member.summary: Generates a long-lived opaque refresh token (7 days).

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IJwtService.AccessTokenExpiry
member.summary: Returns the expiry DateTime for a new access token.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IJwtService.RefreshTokenExpiry
member.summary: Returns the expiry DateTime for a new refresh token.

member.name: M:IDADRS.Application.Interfaces.IJwtService.GetUsernameFromToken(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts the username from a token without validating signature.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Application.Services.AuthService
member.summary:
Handles registration, login, and JWT refresh token rotation. BCrypt cost factor: 12 (matches §5 requirement).
SOLID note — SRP: this class only manages auth flow. JWT generation is delegated to IJwtService (DIP).

member.name: T:IDADRS.Application.Services.FileStorageService
member.summary: §8 File Storage — saves uploads to /uploads/{year}/{month}/{guid}.{ext}, validates MIME type + size, and generates HMAC-SHA256 signed download URLs.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Application.Services.JwtService
member.summary: Generates and validates JWT access tokens + opaque refresh tokens. Access token lifetime : 15 minutes. Refresh token lifetime: 7 days.

member.name: T:IDADRS.Application.Services.ReportService
member.summary: Produces usage stats, audit log, and CSV-based PDF/Excel exports. PDF: lightweight HTML→text via StringBuilder (swap QuestPDF for production). Excel: RFC-4180 CSV (swap ClosedXML for production column types).
